subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in the city of Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर के प्रमुख कठिनाइयाँ क्या हैं ?
B_en: Cenotaph of Maharaja Sawai Man Singh II
B_hi: सवाई महाराजा सवाई सावाई मंसून सांस
explanation_en: Jaigarh Fort is located in Jaipur city and was built by Maharaja Jai Singh II.

QA_en: What is the name of Rajasthan's capital?
explanation_en: Jaipur is the capital city of Rajasthan and also known as Amer. Amer Fort is the famous historical monument located in Jaipur.
